nasb.text: You have fed them with the bread of tears, And You have made them to drink tears in large measure.

esv.text: You have fed them with the bread of tears and given them tears to drink in full measure.

cnv.text: 你使他們以眼淚當餅吃， 使他們喝滿杯的淚水。

ccb.text: 你使我们以泪洗面， 以哀伤果腹，

csbs.text: 你以眼泪当作粮食给他们吃， 又把大碗的眼泪给他们喝。
